name: Jack-o'-Lantern Pumpkin
subject: holidays/halloween
prompt: a carved jack-o'-lantern pumpkin with a wide toothy grin, two triangle eyes and a triangle nose, a curly stem and a leaf on top, sitting on a little patch of grass with a tiny bat flying above

name: Friendly Halloween Ghost
subject: holidays/halloween
prompt: a cute floating ghost with a round wavy bottom, big friendly eyes and a happy open smile, arms raised in a gentle playful boo, a few small stars and a crescent moon around it

name: Witch on a Broomstick
subject: holidays/halloween
prompt: a cheerful young witch flying on a broomstick across the night sky, a tall pointed hat, a flowing cloak and striped stockings, a crescent moon and scattered stars behind her, her hair streaming in the wind

name: Halloween Black Cat
subject: holidays/halloween
prompt: a black cat with an arched back and puffed-up tail standing beside a small pumpkin, pointed ears, big round eyes and curling whiskers, a full moon glowing behind it

name: Spooky Haunted House
subject: holidays/halloween
prompt: a tall spooky haunted house with crooked windows, a pointed roof and a leaning tower, a creaky front door and a winding path, bare twisty trees and a full moon, a couple of bats circling the chimney

name: Trick-or-Treat Kids
subject: holidays/halloween
prompt: two happy children in costumes holding out candy buckets at a doorstep, one dressed as a little ghost and one as a pumpkin, a carved jack-o'-lantern glowing beside the door, a few falling leaves around their feet

name: Easy Halloween Pumpkin
subject: holidays/halloween
prompt: a single big round smiling pumpkin with a short curly stem and one simple leaf, very thick bold shapes and a cheerful happy face, plenty of open space to color

name: Candy Corn Close-Up
subject: holidays/halloween
prompt: a large close-up piece of candy corn with three clear striped bands, a cute smiling face on the front, surrounded by a few small wrapped candies and a tiny pumpkin

name: Bats and Full Moon
subject: holidays/halloween
prompt: a flock of cute cartoon bats with little fangs flying across a big full moon, a bare spooky tree branch reaching in from one side, a scatter of stars filling the night sky

name: Halloween Spider Web
subject: holidays/halloween
prompt: a friendly round spider with eight legs and big eyes hanging from a single thread in the middle of a large detailed spider web stretched between two corners, a tiny dangling pumpkin charm nearby

name: Halloween Skeleton Wave
subject: holidays/halloween
prompt: a friendly cartoon skeleton standing and waving hello with a big grin, clearly drawn ribs and rounded bones, slightly bent knees in a relaxed pose, a small bat and a pumpkin at its feet

name: Halloween Mummy
subject: holidays/halloween
prompt: a cute cartoon mummy wrapped in long bandages with loose trailing ends, two big round eyes peeking through a gap in the wraps, arms held out in a playful pose, a small spider dangling beside it
